_comment: Fixed prompt set for autobench evaluation. DO NOT MODIFY. These prompts cover diverse scenarios to stress-test sparse attention methods on Wan2.1-1.3B. Categories: motion, temporal coherence, fine detail, scene complexity.

prompts.prompt: A professional dancer performing a fluid contemporary dance routine in a sunlit studio with wooden floors, full body visible, continuous flowing movement.
Ocean waves crashing against rocky cliffs during a storm, dramatic spray of water, dark churning sea with whitecaps.
A cheetah sprinting across the African savanna at full speed, dust kicking up behind it, golden grass blurring in the background.
Slow cinematic drone shot flying through a misty mountain valley at sunrise, revealing a hidden lake surrounded by pine trees.
Smooth tracking shot following a person walking through a busy Tokyo street at night, neon signs reflecting off wet pavement.
A single candle flame flickering gently in a dark room, warm light casting soft shadows on old books stacked nearby.
Portrait of an elderly man with deep wrinkles sitting on a park bench in autumn, leaves slowly drifting down around him.
A still life painting-like scene of fresh fruit on a wooden table, soft window light, slight dust particles floating in the air.
A flower blooming in timelapse, petals slowly unfurling from bud to full bloom, smooth continuous motion over the entire duration.
A glass being slowly filled with water from a faucet, water level rising steadily, light refracting through the glass consistently.
A clock pendulum swinging back and forth with perfect regularity, wooden grandfather clock, consistent rhythmic motion.
Close-up of a young woman's face as she transitions from a neutral expression to a gentle smile, detailed skin texture and eyes.
A man with a thick beard speaking directly to camera, natural mouth movements and blinking, studio lighting.
Close-up of hands playing a piano, fingers pressing keys with precision, visible finger joints and nail details.
A hand writing the word 'hello' on white paper with a black fountain pen, clear legible handwriting forming letter by letter.
Aerial view of a crowded farmers market with many people walking between colorful stalls of produce and flowers.
A busy intersection in a modern city, multiple cars, buses, and pedestrians all moving simultaneously, traffic lights changing.
Underwater footage of a coral reef teeming with tropical fish, gentle current moving sea plants, sunlight filtering from above.
A snow-covered forest with sunlight breaking through the trees, small snowflakes gently falling, peaceful winter atmosphere.
Colorful paint swirling in water, vivid blue and gold ink dispersing in slow motion, mesmerizing fluid dynamics.
Interior of a grand cathedral with stained glass windows, light beams streaming through, slow camera pan revealing vaulted ceilings.
A room transitioning from bright daylight to sunset golden hour, shadows lengthening across hardwood floors, warm color shift.
Two dogs playing fetch in a green park, one golden retriever and one border collie, running and jumping together.
Close-up of rain droplets hitting a still pond surface, each drop creating perfect circular ripples that interact with each other.
A paper airplane being thrown across a large room, following its complete arc from launch to landing, continuous flight path.

metadata._fast_eval_note: 9 prompts covering each major category for fast screening
